subject: Add SECCOM-recommended version check in security tests

Patch Set 1:

looks fine, I will make a test on my env asap

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> looks fine, I will make a test on my env asap

I verified it locally on Core deployment [1] and I'm currently running it on elalto.onap.eu [2] - I'll confirm results once it finishes

I'm a little concerned, though:
- there are no recommendation-compliant containers in Core deployment (unless Python an Java are absent on Docker container image)
- this check does not support "recommended-or-later" version check yet (to be fixed)
- test run takes extremely long, time-to-results has to be improved

[1] https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/onap/resources/environments/core-onap.yaml
[2] docker run --rm -t -v $HOME/.kube/config:/root/.kube/config -v /tmp/results:/var/lib/xtesting/results security:1e23a790 /check_versions.sh onap -r /check_versions/recommended_versions.yaml

Please note: I had to apply minor manual changes to security:1e23a790 container image for the few issues I faced post-deployment (already included in this patch set)

Patch Set 2: Verified+1

Verified on master.onap.eu

I'm investigating ways to decrease inspection time (currently ~2h)

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

2h is a bit long for CI..
we can merge the patch, and not trigger it for the moment in the CI
we could run it on daily and not in gating
or run it only the week end..

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2
> 
> 2h is a bit long for CI..
> we can merge the patch, and not trigger it for the moment in the CI
> we could run it on daily and not in gating
> or run it only the week end..

Weekly runs at the initial stage sounds reasonable. When bumps to SECCOM-recommended versions get more traction we can switch to daily runs.
